etymology.description: semantic 女 (nǚ, "woman") + phonetic 里 (lǐ) -> wife of a younger brother
etymology.interpretation: The character combines 女(nǚ, "woman"), indicating the female gender, with the phonetic component 里(lǐ) to denote the sound and to signify marital relation within a family setting. The role of a woman as a wife within the younger generation of a family is the conceptual bridge to the specific meaning of 'wife of a younger brother'.
